subcodes.first_line: O thou who art near relief! Thy letter was received and read, but owing to lack of time the reply must be brief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرج القریب نامه شما رسید و ملاحظه گردید لکن از عدم فرصت مختصر جواب
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
